title: centrostemma coriaceum
intro: Centrostemma coriaceum, also known as the rough centaury, is a plant species that belongs to the family Gentianaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Centrostemma coriaceum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antiviral properties. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and infections.
